name: terradev-mcp
description: Complete Agentic GPU Infrastructure for Claude Code — 113 MCP tools: Full training lifecycle, inference deployment with cost guardrails, Ray cluster management (Wide-EP, disaggregated P/D, parallelism strategy), vLLM lifecycle (start/stop/sleep/wake/inference), SGLang (expert parallel, metrics), Ollama (pull/chat/generate), W&B experiment tracking, LangSmith GPU-cost correlation, MLflow model registry, DVC checkpoint staging, KServe InferenceService generation, egress optimization, manifest-cached provisioning with drift detection, smart deployment, model orchestrator, warm pool, budget-aware auto-scaling, workflow pipelines, GitOps, InferX serverless, HuggingFace Spaces, session-state resources, agent-oriented recommendations, cost confirmation gates, and Terraform-powered parallel provisioning across 20 cloud providers
author: Terradev
